reads.note: Client-side sync status the UI renders. NOT a persisted server entity today — it is the projection of the SyncService seam (sync.online / sync.syncing / sync.lastSyncedAt / sync.watchPendingCount()). Maps to the offline-first delta-sync protocol: lastSyncedAt is the cursor watermark, pendingCount is the count of local rows with syncState==pending awaiting push. online/syncing are pure client/connectivity state and are display-only (no backend field).

fields.name: online
fields.note: Client connectivity flag (ValueNotifier<bool>, real impl connectivity_plus). Display-only; drives OfflineBanner + offline copy. No server field.

fields.name: syncing
fields.note: True while a sync pass is in flight (ValueNotifier<bool>). Display-only; drives 'Backing up…' + Meter + button loading.

fields.name: lastSyncedAt
fields.note: DateTime? of last successful sync. Null until first sync (UI falls back to display literal 'yesterday, 6:10pm'). Corresponds to the delta-sync cursor watermark (GET /sync?since=<cursor>).

fields.name: pendingCount
fields.note: Count of unsynced local rows (Stream<int> from watchPendingCount(): sum of syncState==pending across Customers+Debts+Payments+Reminders). The push side of the delta protocol.

actions.name: syncNow
actions.trigger: 'Back up now' PrimaryButton -> sync.syncNow(); also fired automatically by sync.setOnline(true) on reconnect. As-built stub flips pending rows to synced after a delay; real impl = delta pull GET /sync?since=<cursor> (changes + tombstones + new cursor) plus push of local pending rows.

payload.name: since
payload.note: Sync cursor / last-synced watermark (lastSyncedAt-derived). Null/absent on first full sync.

expectedResponse.note: Per declared/sync.json: { changes, tombstones, cursor }. Client re-applies changes, deletes tombstones, advances cursor -> updates lastSyncedAt, clears pendingCount.

authContext.note: Screen does not gate on role; sync is per-business and available to any authenticated user (owner|staff). All queries scoped to JWT businessId.

special.note: This is THE sync surface — the client-facing view of the offline-first delta-sync protocol (GET /sync?since=<cursor> pull + pending push). syncNow does both directions.

uiStatesNote: Explicitly rendered: offline ('You're offline' + OfflineBanner + disabled button), syncing ('Backing up…' + progress Meter + loading button), synced/resting ('Last backed up' + 'Everything is backed up'), and pending ('N change(s) waiting to back up'). NO error/failure state is handled in the screen — syncNow has no error UI (task-hinted 'error' state is absent as-built).
